2605.14851.title: IFPV: An Integrated Multi-Agent Framework for Generative Operational Planning and High-Fidelity Plan Verification
2605.14851.paper_summary: Operational plan generation and verification are critical for modern complex and rapidly changing battlefield environments, yet traditional generation and verification methods still respectively face the challenges of generation infeasibility and verification insufficiency. To alleviate these limitations, we propose an Integrated Multi-Agent Framework for Generative Operational Planning and High-Fidelity Plan Verification (IFPV). IFPV consists of two tightly coupled modules: Multi-Perspective Hierarchical Agents (MPHA) for generative operational planning and an Adversarial Cognitive Simulation Engine (ACSE) for high-fidelity adversarial plan verification. MPHA decomposes commander intent into executable multi-platform tactical action sequences through the collaboration of Pathfinder, Analyst, and Planner agents. ACSE introduces an opponent equipped with a customized world model, which predicts the future evolution of mission-critical platforms and conducts dynamic counteractions against candidate plans. Simulation experiments in the Asymmetric Combat Tactic Simulator (ACTS) show that IFPV improves mission success by 19.4% and reduces operational cost by 41.7% compared with a single-step large language model (LLM) planning baseline. Compared with a traditional rule-based validator, ACSE increases the average suppression rate by 31.8%, indicating that the proposed verification environment is stricter and more discriminative in revealing the latent vulnerabilities of candidate plans. The code for IFPV can be found at https://github.com/zhigao3ks/IFPV.
2605.14851.paper_summary_zh: 作戰計劃的生成與驗證對於現代複雜且快速變化的戰場環境至關重要，然而傳統的生成與驗證方法仍然面臨生成不可行性和驗證不足的挑戰。為了緩解這些限制，我們提出了一個集成的多代理框架，用於生成作戰計劃和高保真計劃驗證（IFPV）。IFPV由兩個緊密耦合的模塊組成：多視角分層代理（MPHA）用於生成作戰計劃，對抗認知模擬引擎（ACSE）用於高保真的對抗計劃驗證。MPHA通過探路者、分析師和規劃者代理的協作，將指揮官意圖分解為可執行的多平台戰術行動序列。ACSE引入了一個配備定制世界模型的對手，該模型預測任務關鍵平台的未來演變，並對候選計劃進行動態反制。非對稱作戰戰術模擬器（ACTS）中的模擬實驗顯示，與單步大型語言模型（LLM）規劃基準相比，IFPV提高了任務成功率19.4%，並將作戰成本降低了41.7%。與傳統的基於規則的驗證器相比，ACSE將平均抑制率提高了31.8%，這表明所提出的驗證環境在揭示候選計劃的潛在脆弱性方面更為嚴格和具有區分性。IFPV的代碼可以在https://github.com/zhigao3ks/IFPV找到。
2605.14851.author: Zhigao Huang et.al.
2605.14851.authors: Zhigao Huang, Zhengqing Hu, Dong Chen, Shaohan Zhang, Zhao Jin, Bo Zhang, Han Wu, Mingliang Xu
